title: Kanyakumari To Kashmir: Indo-Australian Man Runs To End Leprosy Stigma
description: A childhood memory from Rishikesh, a cricketing hero from Australia, and 4,700 kilometres of road - that is what brought 23-year-old Om Satija back to India. Not as a tourist, but as an ultramarathoner on a mission to end the stigma around leprosy.
